_note: The notional product development lifecycle: stages → subphases → their key activities — the SKELETON of the spine (ids, names, order, hue, tagline). Hierarchy is lifecycle → phases → subphases → activities. Editorial PROSE (canon + the editor's note) lives in content/phases/<id>.md and is merged into the compiled snapshot by `npm run build-content`; activity-level prose is keyed there by activity id. Edit either, then run build-content to recompile + validate. ids are stable references: use cases place by activity id (the subphase is derived from it), and the phase prose files reference phase + activity ids — keep them stable when renaming. Phase numbers, subphase numbers, and soft tints derive automatically; hue may be omitted to auto-assign from the palette. NOTE: subphase names below are a first-draft scaffold — rename them and grow each to its real 5–10 activities here. (A phase may still use a flat "activities" array instead of "subphases"; it compiles as a single implicit subphase.)

phases.name: Discover
phases.tagline: Understand the problem and decide what to build.

subphases.name: Understand
subphases.tagline: Get close to the customer and the market.

subphases.name: Frame
subphases.tagline: Turn signal into a stated problem worth solving.

subphases.name: Define
subphases.tagline: Commit to what's in, and in what order.

phases.name: Build
phases.tagline: Design, prototype, and ship the thing.

subphases.name: Design
subphases.tagline: Shape the solution and the calls behind it.

subphases.name: Implement
subphases.tagline: Write the code and the docs that explain it.

subphases.name: Verify
subphases.tagline: Prove it works before it ships.

phases.name: Grow
phases.tagline: Launch, learn, and keep it running.

subphases.name: Launch
subphases.tagline: Get it into the world and into hands.

subphases.name: Measure
subphases.tagline: Learn from real use and act on it.

subphases.name: Operate
subphases.tagline: Keep it healthy and close the loop.
